title: SkillPack
description: OmniSupport Copilot Week09 Agent Skill Pack contract. A skill is a portable folder with SKILL.md plus optional scripts, references, and assets.

name.description: Portable skill identifier. Folder name should match.

description.description: Discovery text used by agents for progressive loading.

version.description: SemVer version for governance and release manifests.

not_for.description: Negative routing hints that reduce accidental activation.

requires.description: Other skill names or repo capabilities required by this skill.

artifacts.description: Expected output artifact paths or path patterns.

evals.description: Golden checks that should run before promotion.
